{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 3, "R1.2": 1, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies the need for a clearer framing of the problem but doesn't fully articulate a new one.", "R1.2": "Doesn't engage with the logical consistency of the presented formalism.", "R1.4": "Names some prior work but doesn't map against it in detail.", "RX.1": "Asserts confidence in all claims without acknowledging uncertainty.", "RX.3": "Mostly stays within the scope of the requested information.", "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content identified.", "RX.5": "Doesn't provide traceability for suggested changes."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.2": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the need for a clearer framing of the problem but doesn't fully articulate a new one.
rationale.R1.2: Doesn't engage with the logical consistency of the presented formalism.
rationale.R1.4: Names some prior work but doesn't map against it in detail.
rationale.RX.1: Asserts confidence in all claims without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly stays within the scope of the requested information.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content identified.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide traceability for suggested changes.
